tools.name: list_equipment
tools.description: Returns all Contoso Electronics equipment with details and computed warranty status.

tools.name: get_equipment
tools.description: Returns details and warranty status for a single asset by its asset ID (e.g., CE-OSC-1200).

tools.name: check_warranty
tools.description: Checks warranty status (Active or Expired, plus days remaining) for an asset by its asset ID.

tools.name: list_work_orders
tools.description: Lists work orders, optionally filtered by assetId or status (Open, In Progress, On Hold, Completed, Cancelled).

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Returns aggregate statistics plus a per-asset warranty breakdown across all equipment. Ideal source data for building a status deck or report.
